    "R1.1": "The contribution claim and gap statement are present but loosely specified — 'make this stronger' most naturally targets sharpening the thesis (what exactly LIRA solves that prior routers cannot) and the problem framing, so reconstruction is centrally implicated.",
    "R1.2": "A critical internal contradiction exists: the abstract asserts the router is 'stateless across queries' and that this property 'permits the closed-form derivation in §3,' yet the third paragraph reveals a sliding-window histogram over the last 10,000 queries refreshed every 500 queries — that is state. Strengthening the text requires resolving or reconciling this inconsistency, making logical consistency load-bearing.",
    "R1.3": "Three quantitative claims (38% latency reduction, 11% over baseline, 22% memory-pressure reduction) are stated without linking to specific tables, figures, or experimental conditions. Strengthening requires tightening evidence-to-claim traceability.",

  "clarification_question": "Should 'make this stronger' prioritize resolving the stateless/stateful contradiction and tightening logical consistency (R1.2 as primary), or is the main goal improving rhetorical force and writing clarity of the existing claims as written (R1.6 as primary), even if the contradiction is left for the authors to address separately?"
}

rationale.R1.1: The contribution claim and gap statement are present but loosely specified — 'make this stronger' most naturally targets sharpening the thesis (what exactly LIRA solves that prior routers cannot) and the problem framing, so reconstruction is centrally implicated.
rationale.R1.2: A critical internal contradiction exists: the abstract asserts the router is 'stateless across queries' and that this property 'permits the closed-form derivation in §3,' yet the third paragraph reveals a sliding-window histogram over the last 10,000 queries refreshed every 500 queries — that is state. Strengthening the text requires resolving or reconciling this inconsistency, making logical consistency load-bearing.
rationale.R1.3: Three quantitative claims (38% latency reduction, 11% over baseline, 22% memory-pressure reduction) are stated without linking to specific tables, figures, or experimental conditions. Strengthening requires tightening evidence-to-claim traceability.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'make this stronger' maps centrally onto prose quality: sentence-level precision, elimination of vague hedges, sharper transitions between the cost-model and empirical sections, and crisper articulation of what is novel. This is a core task.

parsed.clarification_question: Should 'make this stronger' prioritize resolving the stateless/stateful contradiction and tightening logical consistency (R1.2 as primary), or is the main goal improving rhetorical force and writing clarity of the existing claims as written (R1.6 as primary), even if the contradiction is left for the authors to address separately?
